card.name: Spiteful Thrall
card.text: {2}{B}, Sacrifice this creature: Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Raevir Guide
card.text: Flying Whenever a creature you control without flying attacks, you may pay {U}. If you do, it gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Honored Dead
card.text: When this creature enters or dies, create a 1/1 white Viking creature token.

card.name: Fireblade Gunnar
card.text: Vigilance {2}{R}: This creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Selfless Sage
card.text: {3}{W}{W}, Sacrifice this creature: Return target artifact or creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Dvergr Inscriber
card.text: Lifelink When this creature enters, create a Glyph token. If you control three or more artifacts, create three of those tokens instead. (Glyphs are artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.")

card.name: Dvergr Longship
card.text: Vigilance When this Vehicle enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature or Vehicle. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Landscaper Colos
card.text: When this creature enters, put target card from an opponent's graveyard on the bottom of their library. Plainscycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Subzero Shattering
card.text: Destroy target artifact or enchantment. Flashback {4}{G} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Unfamiliar Territory
card.text: Voyage — Unfamiliar Territory deals damage to target attacking or blocking creature equal to the number of differently named lands you control.

card.name: Charge In
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn. Draw a card.

card.name: Bjorn's Blessing
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If you control a God, that creature gets +4/+4 until end of turn instead.

card.name: Shipwreck Stalker
card.text: Flash Pillage (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.)

card.name: Upwash Leader
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature attacks, creature spells with flying you cast cost {1} less to cast until end of turn.

card.name: Belhime's Sentinel
card.text: Vigilance {G}, {T}: Untap target land.

card.name: Frostburn Draugr
card.text: Pillage (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.)

card.name: Novice Shipwright
card.text: {1}{R}: Target creature gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Draugr Vanguard
card.text: {4}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Return two other target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Etli's Denial
card.text: Counter target spell. If you control a God, draw a card.

card.name: Feathered Tune
card.text: This Vehicle can't be blocked. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Walking Nightmare
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature doesn't untap during its controller's untap step. {1}{W}: Attach Walking Nightmare to target creature.

card.name: Rolling Waves
card.text: Target creature's controller puts it on the top or bottom of their library. Islandcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for an Island card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Mystic Communion
card.text: Voyage — Scry X, where X is the number of differently named lands you control, then draw two cards.

card.name: Leap
card.text: Target creature gains flying until end of turn. Draw a card.

card.name: Leira Muckdredgers
card.text: When this creature enters, target player mills two cards. {1}{G}, Exile a card from your graveyard: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Draugr Corsair
card.text: Deathtouch Pillage (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.)

card.name: Raevir Lifeweaver
card.text: Flying Voyage — {5}{B}: This creature gains deathtouch and lifelink until end of turn. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each differently named land you control.

card.name: Restless Combatant
card.text: You may cast this creature from your graveyard by discarding a card in addition to paying its other costs.

card.name: Dokkar Cohort
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, if {W} was spent to cast it, create a 1/1 white Viking creature token.

card.name: Murkwater Scrounger
card.text: Kicker {U} (You may pay an additional {U} as you cast this spell.) When this creature enters, if it was kicked, target player mills five cards. {2}{B}, Exile a card from your graveyard: Draw a card.

card.name: Soul Exhumer
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, return target non-Angel creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Rise Again
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Fellwind Dredger
card.text: When this Vehicle enters, target opponent sacrifices a creature. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Cremate
card.text: Exile target card from a graveyard. Draw a card.

card.name: Soulbreaker
card.text: Lifelink Swampcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Swamp card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Brekka Bladesmith
card.text: Haste This creature gets +1/+1 as long as you control an artifact.

card.name: Kilvik Runekarl
card.text: Kicker {W} (You may pay an additional {W} as you cast this spell.) When this creature enters, if it was kicked, create two Glyph tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.")

card.name: Seskrin's Apprentrice
card.text: Kicker {3}{R} (You may pay an additional {3}{R} as you cast this spell.) When this creature enters, if it was kicked or if you control a God, unearth target artifact or creature card. (To unearth an artifact or creature card, return it from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the end step or if it would leave the battlefield.)

card.name: Rakish Raider
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes tapped, you may exile two cards from your graveyard. When you do, target creature can't block this turn.

card.name: Pitiless Pillagers
card.text: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) Pillage (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.)

card.name: Vindictive Valkyr
card.text: Flying (This creature can't be blocked except by creatures with flying or reach.) Haste (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control.)

card.name: Warleader Aspirant
card.text: Trample {5}{G}: This creature gets +4/+4 until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Fiery Barde
card.text: When this Vehicle enters, other creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn. Haste Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Barbarian's Strength
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature gets +2/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn. • Destroy target artifact.

card.name: Tectonic Bombardment
card.text: Voyage — Tectonic Bombardment deals damage to target creature or planeswalker equal to the number of differently named lands you control.

card.name: Glancing Blow
card.text: Glancing Blow deals 1 damage to target player or planeswalker. Draw a card.

card.name: Relic Blade
card.text: Equipped creature gets +2/+0 and has haste and menace. Equip {3} or {B}

card.name: Memory Preserver
card.text: {2}{W}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Return target artifact or enchantment card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Champion of the Wilderness
card.text: Voyage — This creature gets +1/+0 for each differently named land you control.

card.name: Leyline Keeper
card.text: this creature gets +2/+2 as long as you control three or more creatures. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Youthful Gunnar
card.text: {R}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target artifact. Activate only as a sorcery. {G}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target enchantment. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Ethereal Groundskeeper
card.text: Reach As long as you control a fortified land, this creature gets +1/+1 and has vigilance.

card.name: Seagrass Sifter
card.text: When this creature enters or dies, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Alfir Warcaller
card.text: When this creature enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Follower of Nmir
card.text: Trample this creature gets +2/+2 as long as you control a God.

card.name: Seatreader Jotun
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may pay {3}{U}. If you do, target creature can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Kelp Siren
card.text: When this creature enters, you may exile three cards from your graveyard. If you do, mill three cards. You may put a creature or land card from among the cards milled this way into your hand.

card.name: Corrupting Touch
card.text: Kicker {B} (You may pay an additional {B} as you cast this spell.) Target creature you control gains deathtouch until end of turn if this spell was kicked. Then it deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control.

card.name: Nmir's Feast
card.text: Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn. Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Explore
card.text: You may play an additional land this turn. Draw a card.

card.name: Collective Company
card.text: Kicker {3}{W} (You may pay an additional {3}{W} as you cast this spell.) When this creature enters, if it was kicked, create two 1/1 white Viking creature tokens. Tap two untapped creatures you control: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Sanctum Constructor
card.text: {T}: Attach target Fortification or Equipment you control to target permanent it could fortify or equip. At the beginning of your end step, if you activated nine or more different abilities this turn (including mana abilities), transform this creature. --- (Back): Carlson, God of Settlements

card.name: Carlson, God of Settlements
card.text: You may pay {0} rather than pay the cost of the first ability you activate during each of your turns that isn't a mana ability. (Fortify and equip abilities are activated.) --- (Front): Sanctum Constructor

card.name: Tarhild Redeemer
card.text: Flying Whenever a nonland permanent enters under your control, if that permanent entered from a graveyard or you cast it from a graveyard, create a 1/1 white Viking creature token.

card.name: Sealing Spirit
card.text: When this creature enters, choose target artifact you control and target nonland permanent you don't control. Exile the permanent you don't control until the artifact you control leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Sigiled Gateway
card.text: Fortified land has "{T}: Create a Glyph token." (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.") Fortify {W}. Activate only once each turn. ({W}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Gilded Frontrunner
card.text: Whenever this Vehicle attacks, other creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Dwarven Metalsong
card.text: Search your library for an Equipment, Fortification, or Vehicle card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Triumph Mage
card.text: When this creature enters, search your library for an artifact card with mana value 4, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Plundering Raevir
card.text: Flying Pillage (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.)

card.name: Leira Plunger
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, target player mills that many cards. At the beginning of your end step, if a graveyard has nine or more cards in it, transform this creature. --- (Back): Anitra, God of the Drowned

card.name: Anitra, God of the Drowned
card.text: Whenever Anitra deals combat damage to a player, that player mills half their library, rounded up. {3}{U}: Anitra can't be blocked this turn. --- (Front): Leira Plunger

card.name: Sturmkeld Skyscribe
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature or another creature with flying enters under your control, create a Glyph token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.")

card.name: Bastion of Knowledge
card.text: Fortified land has "{T}: Draw a card." Fortify {2}{U}. Activate only once each turn. ({2}{U}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Mirage Skimmer
card.text: You may have this Vehicle enter the battlefield as a copy of any creature or Vehicle you control, except it's a Vehicle artifact with crew 2 and it loses all other card types. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Rewind
card.text: Counter target spell. Untap up to four lands.

card.name: Blackwater Chanter
card.text: When this creature enters, target player mills two cards. You gain 1 life for each creature card milled this way. {X}{B}, {T}, Exile X cards from your graveyard: Target creature gets -X/-X until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Twilight Chaser
card.text: Flying, lifelink Other creatures you control with flying have lifelink. At the beginning of your end step, if you have 9 or more life than an opponent, transform this creature. --- (Back): Revna, God of Midnights

card.name: Revna, God of Midnights
card.text: Flying, lifelink Other creatures you control with flying have lifelink. Whenever you gain life, each opponent loses that much life. --- (Front): Twilight Chaser

card.name: Grim Valkyr
card.text: Flying When Grim Valkyr enters, destroy target creature or planeswalker an opponent controls.

card.name: Emerge from the Underrealm
card.text: Kicker {1}{B} (You may pay an additional {1}{B} as you cast this spell.) Choose target creature or planeswalker card in your graveyard. If this spell was kicked, return it to the battlefield. Otherwise, unearth it. (Return it from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the end step or if it would leave the battlefield.)

card.name: Funeral Courier
card.text: Whenever a creature you control dies, create a Glyph token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.") Sacrifice a creature: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn. Activate only once each turn and only as a sorcery. Crew 2

card.name: Den of the Fell God
card.text: Fortified land has "{T}, Sacrifice this land: Return target creature or Vehicle card from your graveyard to your hand." Fortify {2}{B}. Activate only once each turn. ({2}{B}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Frenzied Immolator
card.text: Haste Voyage — {5}{R}: This creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each differently named land you control.

card.name: Tireless Runescribe
card.text: Haste {T}: Create a Glyph token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.") At the beginning of your end step, if you control nine or more artifacts, transform this creature. --- (Back): Svend, God of Inscriptions

card.name: Svend, God of Inscriptions
card.text: First strike, trample {T}: Create a Glyph token. Artifacts you control have "{T}: Target creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn." --- (Front): Tireless Runescribe

card.name: Relentless Invader
card.text: Pillage (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.) Whenever you discard a card, you may exile that card from your graveyard. If you do, you may play that card this turn.

card.name: Avalanche Jotun
card.text: Voyage — When this creature enters, it deals damage to target creature or planeswalker equal to the number of differently named lands you control. Mountaincycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Mountain card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Obliterating Bolt
card.text: Obliterating Bolt deals 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If that creature or planeswalker would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Battering Cart
card.text: Haste When this Vehicle enters, it becomes an artifact creature until end of turn. Crew 2 Unearth {3}{R} ({3}{R}: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the end step or if it would leave the battlefield. Unearth only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Raiders' Encampment
card.text: Fortified land has "{T}: Creatures you control gain haste until end of turn." Fortify {R} ({R}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Whisper in the Woods
card.text: {T}: Untap target land. {5}{G}, Sacrifice this creature: Put six +1/+1 counters on target land you control. It becomes a becomes a 0/0 Elemental creature with haste that's still a land.

card.name: Dokkar Clansman
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one— • Create two 1/1 white Viking creature tokens. • Create two Glyph tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.") • Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature for each creature you control.

card.name: Caring Cultivator
card.text: Whenever a land enters the battlefield under your control, if it doesn't share a name with another land you control or a land card in your graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. At the beginning of your end step, if this creature has power 9 or greater, transform it. --- (Back): Jurgen, God of Bounty

card.name: Jurgen, God of Bounty
card.text: Vigilance, trample, ward {2} Whenever a land enters the battlefield under your control, if it doesn't share a name with another land you control or a land card in your graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. --- (Front): Caring Cultivator

card.name: Jotun Amplifier
card.text: {T}: Add {G}{G}{G}.

card.name: Murkwater Voyager
card.text: When this Vehicle enters, surveil 2. Whenever this Vehicle attacks, you may exile a card from your graveyard. If a creature card is exiled this way, put a +1/+1 counter on this Vehicle. If a noncreature card is exiled this way, put your choice of a vigilance counter, a reach counter, or a trample counter on this Vehicle. Crew 2

card.name: Outland Settlements
card.text: Fortified land has "{T}: Create a 1/1 white Viking creature token." Fortify {1}{G}. Activate only once each turn. ({1}{G}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Long Way Home
card.text: Search your library for a land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Flashback {3}{G} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Dauntless Bear
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you control nine or more creatures, transform this creature. --- (Back): Bjorn, God of Courage

card.name: Bjorn, God of Courage
card.text: Ward {X}, where X is the number of creatures you control. Bjorn, God of Courage's power and toughness are each equal to the number of creatures you control. --- (Front): Dauntless Bear

card.name: Valkyr General
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast a red spell, creatures you control gain double strike until end of turn. Whenever you cast a white spell, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Ceaseless Butcher
card.text: Pillage (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.) At the beginning of your upkeep, if there are nine or more creature cards in your graveyard, you may transform this creature. --- (Back): Galdur, Fell God

card.name: Galdur, Fell God
card.text: Ward—Sacrifice a creature. At the beginning of combat, you may exile a creature card from your graveyard. If you do, Galdur gets +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the exiled card's mana value. --- (Front): Ceaseless Butcher

card.name: Drink the Cosmos
card.text: Each player's life total becomes 9.

card.name: Grim Lavamancer
card.text: {R}, {T}, Exile two cards from your graveyard: This creature deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Draugr Uprising
card.text: Unearth X target creature cards. (To unearth a creature card, return it from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the end step or if it would leave the battlefield.)

card.name: Jotun Chanter
card.text: {T}: Add two mana of any one color. {9}: Transform this creature. Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Back): Nmir, God of Boons

card.name: Nmir, God of Boons
card.text: Ward {9} {X}, {T}: Put X +1/+1 counters on another target creature. Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Front): Jotun Chanter

card.name: Kell of the North Wind
card.text: Vigilance You may have Kell enter as a copy of another creature on the battlefield, except it has vigilance and "Whenever this creature attacks, you may pay {2}{RW}{RW}. If you do, there's an additional combat step after this one."

card.name: Duskfeather Soulguide
card.text: Flying Other creatures you control with flying get +1/+1. {1}{W}{U}, Exile this creature from your graveyard: Put a flying counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Mesmeric Drowner
card.text: Ward—Discard a card (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player discards a card.) At the beginning of your upkeep, each player with the fewest amount of cards in hand mills three cards.

card.name: Kilvik Sage
card.text: Voyage — When this creature enters, scry X, where X is the number of differently named lands you control, then reveal the top card of your library. If it's a permanent card, draw a card.

card.name: Unstoppable Valkyr
card.text: Flying, vigilance As long as this card is in your graveyard, spells you cast that target it cost {3} less to cast and abilities you activate that target it cost {3} less to activate.

card.name: Smuggler's Sailcraft
card.text: Trample Pillage (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.) Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Trench Feeder
card.text: As this creature enters, choose a player. This creature gets +1/+1 for each different mana value among cards in the chosen player's graveyard.

card.name: Tarhild Escort
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, return target nonland permanent card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it. When this creature leaves the battlefield, exile the permanent put onto the battlefield with this creature.

card.name: Radiant Skies
card.text: Search your library and/or graveyard for a Plains card, an Island card, a Swamp card, a Mountain card, and a Forest card, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Basic landcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Thunder Slinger
card.text: Double strike (This creature deals both first-strike and regular combat damage.) Trample (This creature can deal excess combat damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.)

card.name: Svetnar General
card.text: Whenever you cast a green spell, untap target permanent you control. Whenever you cast a white spell, tap target nonland permanent you don't control.

card.name: Margyr General
card.text: Whenever you cast a black spell, target player mills two cards. Whenever you cast a green spell, exile up to one card from target player's graveyard.

card.name: Mobile City
card.text: Fortified lands you control are 4/4 creatures in addition to its other types. Fortify {3} ({3}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Courageous Solidarity
card.text: As this enchantment enters, choose a creature type. Whenever you cast a spell of the chosen type, create a 1/1 white Viking creature token.

card.name: Grim Solidarity
card.text: As this enchantment enters, choose a creature type. Whenever you cast a spell of the chosen type, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Fervent Solidarity
card.text: As this enchantment enters, choose a creature type. Whenever a nontoken creature of the chosen type enters under your control, put a +1/+1 counter on it. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Venture the Realms
card.text: Voyage — Create a 1/1 white Viking creature token for each differently named land you control.

card.name: Echoes of Sondar
card.text: Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard during your turn, put a despair counter on this enchantment, then create an X/X colorless Avatar creature token, where X is the number of despair counters on this enchantment. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Raevir Gustcaller
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control with flying.

card.name: Dokkar Raidmaster
card.text: Haste When this creature enters, creatures you control gain vigilance, menace, and trample until end of turn. {W}{B}{G}, Discard this creature: Create three 1/1 white Viking creature tokens. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Guiding Valkyr
card.text: Flying Whenever another nonland permanent enters under your control, if that permanent entered from a graveyard or you cast it from a graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. If that permanent is a creature, also put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Agony of Unlife
card.text: When this creature enters, return target nonenchantment card from your graveyard to your hand. Creatures you control have haste. If you would draw a card while your library has no cards in it, instead create a 1/1 white Viking creature token.

card.name: Draugr Submerger
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast as long as there are seven or more cards in a graveyard. Pillage (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.)

card.name: Brekka Titanship
card.text: Menace Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Margyr Sorceress
card.text: When this creature enters, target player mills five cards. Menace This creature gets +5/+5 as long as there are thirty or more cards total in all graveyards.

card.name: Primal Monolith
card.text: Fortified land is a 6/6 Giant Spirit creature with vigilance and haste that's still a land. Fortify {5} ({5}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Apex Worldpost
card.text: Untap all fortified lands you control during each player's untap step. Fortify {1} ({1}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Raevir Soulmage
card.text: Flying, deathtouch, lifelink Whenever another creature with flying enters under your control, choose one— • Put a +1/+1 counter on that creature. • Put a deathtouch counter on that creature. • Put a lifelink counter on that creature.

card.name: Bloodspitter Draugr
card.text: Whenever one or more nonland cards leave your graveyard, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Jotun Invoker
card.text: {8}: This creature has base power and toughness 10/10 until end of turn.

card.name: Paragon of the Pure
card.text: Voyage — When this creature enters, you gain life equal to the number of differently named lands you control.

card.name: Tyranny of the Horde
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature gets -1/-1 for each creature you control.

card.name: Brekka Flagship
card.text: Haste At the beginning of combat on your turn, another target Vehicle you control becomes an artifact creature until end of turn. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Resillient Warband
card.text: Deathtouch (Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.) Whenever this creature attacks, you may exile a card from your graveyard. If you do, create a 1/1 white Viking creature token that's tapped and attacking.

card.name: Persistent Valkyr
card.text: Flying Unearth {1}{R}{W} ({1}{R}{W}: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the end step or if it would leave the battlefield. Unearth only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Horizon Treader
card.text: Haste This creature can't be blocked. This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Olaf, Dvergr King
card.text: Vigilance Whenever an artifact enters under your control, put a +1/+1 counter on each Dwarf creature you control. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Grotnar, Fell Champion
card.text: Pillage (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.) Whenever a Zombie card is put into your graveyard from anywhere for the first time each turn, each opponent discards a card.

card.name: Belhime, Voice of Peace
card.text: When Belhime enters, scry 3, then reveal the top card of your library. If it's a permanent card, draw a card. If damage would be dealt to Belhime or another Spirit you control, prevent X of that damage, where X is the number of fortified lands you control.

card.name: Raidleader Brynja
card.text: Flying Whenever Raidleader Brynja or another Angel enters under your control for the first time each turn, unearth target creature card. (To unearth a creature card, return it from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the end step or if it would leave the battlefield.)

card.name: Ingmar, the Drowner
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) Tap three untapped Merfolk you control: Target player mills five cards.

card.name: Irilai, the Siren's Wail
card.text: Flying Whenever a Bird you control deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it. If you do, gain control of target nonland permanent that player controls.

card.name: Gardir, Primal Voice
Bloodfell Caves
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {B} or {R}.

card.name: Dismal Backwater
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {U} or {B}.

card.name: Rugged Highlands
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {R} or {G}.

card.name: Brekka Port
card.text: ({T}: Add {R}.) This land enters tapped unless you control an Island and a Plains. {U}{R}{W}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Vehicles you control become artifact creatures until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Belhime's Tithe
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}.

card.name: Battlefield Bonepicker
card.text: Flying Pillage (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.)

card.name: Break the Earth
card.text: Destroy target land and all permanents attached to it.

card.name: Primal Ferocity
card.text: Target creature gets +3/+2 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Viking Funeral
card.text: Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Dvergr Innovator
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)

card.name: Salvage Reclaimer
card.text: When this creature enters, you may put target permanent card from your graveyard on top of your library.

card.name: Engraved Arms
Shield Formation
card.text: Target permanent you control gains hexproof until end of turn. If that permanent is a creature, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Sigil of Might
card.text: Put three +1/+1 counters on target creature or Vehicle. If it's a creature, it gains trample until end of turn. Forestcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Blossoming Sands
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {G} or {W}.

card.name: Refracting Pool
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {3}, {T}: Add three mana in any combination of colors.

card.name: Jungle Hollow
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Scoured Barrens
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: Swiftwater Cliffs
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.name: Thornwood Falls
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Tranquil Cove
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {W} or {U}.

card.name: Wind-Scarred Crag
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {R} or {W}.

card.name: Dvergr Likeness
card.text: This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control. You may have this creature enter as a copy of any creature on the battlefield, except it's a 0/0 artifact creature in addition to its other types and has "This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control."

card.name: Mindpicker Raevir
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, that player's maximum hand size is reduced by one for the rest of the game.

card.name: Meet the Challenge
card.text: Search your library for a creature card with mana value X or less, put it onto the battlefield, and shuffle. Then that creature fights up to one target creature you don't control.

card.name: Burn the City
card.text: Voyage — Destroy all creatures. Burn the City deals damage to target opponent equal to the number of differently named lands you control.

card.name: Moonlight Bargain
card.text: Look at the top five cards of your library. For each card, put that card into your graveyard unless you pay 2 life. Then put the rest into your hand.

card.name: Rampaging Horde
card.text: Whenever one or more nonland cards leave your graveyard, create a 1/1 white Viking creature token, then creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain haste until end of turn. {B}{R}, {T}: Exile target card from a graveyard.

card.name: Primal Solidarity
card.text: As this enchantment enters, choose a creature type. Spells you cast of the chosen type cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Tinkerbox
card.text: {1}, {T}, Exile this artifact: Return target artifact or creature card from your graveyard to your hand. {2}, {T}, Exile this artifact: Create a Clue token, a Glyph token, and a Treasure token. {3}, {T}, Exile this artifact: Search your library for an artifact card not named Tinkerbox, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Secrets of the Rime
card.text: For each player, exile target card from that player's graveyard. You may play those cards for as long as they remain exiled, and mana of any type can be spent to cast those spells. Exile Secrets of the Rime.

card.name: Sondaran Knell
card.text: Sondaran Knell can't be countered. Destroy target nonenchantment permanent.

card.name: Surmount
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Creatures you don't control get -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: Punish the Weak
card.text: Target creature gains first strike, lifelink, and deathtouch until end of turn.

card.name: Primal Force
card.text: Choose one or more— • Primal Force deals X damage to target player. • Target creature gets +X/+0 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Vedgard Gardens
card.text: Whenever a fortified land you control becomes tapped, you gain 1 life. Fortify {1}. Activate only once each turn. ({1}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Slag Reforger
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes tapped, create a Glyph token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.") Sacrifice three artifacts: Return target artifact, instant, or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand. Activate only once each turn and only as a sorcery.

card.name: Lightning Helix
card.text: Lightning Helix deals 3 damage to any target and you gain 3 life.

card.name: Forward Garrison
card.text: When this Fortification enters, create two 1/1 white Viking creature tokens. Vikings you control get +1/+1 for each fortified land you control. Fortify {1}{W} ({1}{W}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Astral Observatory
card.text: Fortified land has "{T}: Scry 1." Fortify {1}. Activate only once each turn. ({1}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Protected Paradise
card.text: Whenever fortified land becomes tapped, add one mana of any color. Fortify {2}. Activate only once each turn. ({2}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Mead Hall
card.text: Fortified land has "{T}: Tap target creature." Fortify {2}. Activate only once each turn. ({2}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Seeker of Pasts
card.text: {T}: Target player mills two cards. At the beginning of your upkeep, if a library has nine or fewer cards in it, you may transform this creature. --- (Back): Etli, God of Yesterdays

card.name: Etli, God of Yesterdays
card.text: Ward—Mill nine cards. (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player mills nine cards.) When this creature transforms into Etli, God of Yesterdays and at the beginning of your upkeep, exile target card from a graveyard. For as long as that card remains exiled, you may play it, and mana of any type can be spent to cast it. --- (Front): Seeker of Pasts

card.name: Valkyr Finisher
card.text: Flying This creature enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it if an opponent was dealt damage this turn.

card.name: Pain for Power
card.text: You draw two cards, lose 2 life, and create a 1/1 white Viking creature token.

card.name: Village Stomper
card.text: Pillage (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.) Mountaincycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Mountain card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Shipseeker Kraken
card.text: Affinity for artifacts (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control.) {5}{U}: This creature can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Sondar Fragment
card.text: ({T}: Add {R}.) This land enters tapped unless you control a Swamp and a Forest. {2}{B}{R}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Destroy target permanent. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Tarhild Hall
card.text: ({T}: Add {W}.) This land enters tapped unless you control a Mountain and a Swamp. {1}{R}{W}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Unearth target artifact or creature card. Activate only as a sorcery. (To unearth an artifact or creature card, return it from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the end step or if it would leave the battlefield.)

card.name: Vedgard Stronghold
card.text: ({T}: Add {W}.) This land enters tapped unless you control a Forest and an Island. {2}{G}{W}{U}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Fortification card, put it onto the battlefield, attach it to a land you control, then shuffle. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Sturmkeld Rookery
card.text: ({T}: Add {U}.) This land enters tapped unless you control a Plains and a Swamp. {2}{W}{U}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Look at the top four cards of your library. You may cast a spell from among them without paying its mana cost. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Jotlund Gorge
card.text: ({T}: Add {U}.) This land enters tapped unless you control a Forest and a Mountain. {3}{G}{U}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Draw three cards. You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Dokkar Battlements
card.text: ({T}: Add {B}.) This land enters tapped unless you control a Plains and a Forest. {2}{W}{B}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Creatures you control get +2/+2 until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Fellwind Tomb
card.text: ({T}: Add {B}.) This land enters tapped unless you control an Island and a Mountain. {U}{B}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Choose target nonland card in your graveyard. Until end of turn, you may cast that card. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Kilvik Ruins
card.text: ({T}: Add {G}.) This land enters tapped unless you control a Mountain and a Plains. Voyage — {1}{R}{G}{W}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Create a 1/1 white Viking creature token. Put X +1/+1 counters on it, where X is the number of differently named lands you control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Leira Outcrop
card.text: ({T}: Add {G}.) This land enters tapped unless you control a Swamp and an Island. {1}{B}{G}{U}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Each player mills three cards. For each creature card put into a graveyard this way, you create a 1/1 white Viking creature token. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Frost Jotun
card.text: When this creature enters, tap up to one target creature or Vehicle and put two stun counters on it.

card.name: Village Outcrops
card.text: When Village Outcrops enters, draw a card. Whenever fortified land becomes tapped, you gain 1 life. Fortify {1}. Activate only once each turn. ({1}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Captive Transport
card.text: When this Vehicle enters, exile target creature or planeswalker until this Vehicle leaves the battlefield. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Freezing Encampment
card.text: Whenever fortified land becomes tapped, target player mills two cards. Fortify {2}. Activate only once each turn. ({2}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Ethereal Karve
card.text: When this Vehicle enters, return target creature or Vehicle you don't control to its owner's hand. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Pungent Necropolis
card.text: Fortified land has "{T}: Each opponent loses 1 life." Fortify {2}. Activate only once each turn. ({2}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Galdur's Scorn
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you control a God. Exile target creature, Vehicle, or planeswalker.

card.name: Raiders' Warship
card.text: When this Vehicle enters, it deals 2 damage to target creature or planeswalker. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Memorial Pass
card.text: Fortified land has "{T}, Discard a card: Draw a card." Fortify {1}. Activate only once each turn. ({1}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Venturing Busse
card.text: Voyage — This Vehicle enters with a number of +1/+1 counters on it equal to the number of differently named lands you control. Crew 3 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 3 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Armaments Outpost
card.text: Fortified land has "{T}: Target creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery." Fortify {2}. Activate only once each turn. ({2}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Vedgard Animus
card.text: Affinity for fortified lands (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each fortified land you control.) Vigilance, trample, ward {2}

card.name: Ingenious Solidarity
card.text: As this enchantment enters, choose a creature type. Whenever you cast a spell of the chosen type, draw a card.

card.name: Raevir Saboteur
card.text: Flying Activated abilities of artifacts cost {1} more to activate. (Fortify, equip, and crew abilities are activated.)

card.name: Silent Sloop
card.text: Creatures entering or leaving the battlefield don't cause abilities to trigger. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: The Oknir
card.text: The Oknir has all abilities of other Vehicles you control and Vehicle cards in your graveyard. Crew 4 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 4 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Aurora Keep
card.text: Fortified lands you control have "Instant and sorcery spells you cast cost {1} less to cast." Fortify {1}{U} ({1}{U}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Blight of Sturmkeld
card.text: Flying At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice this creature unless a creature with flying entered under your control this turn.

card.name: Contempt for the Nine
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Choose one or more — • Destroy target creature, Vehicle, or planeswalker. • Return target creature or planeswalker card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Barge of the Dead
card.text: Menace, haste Exile a creature card from your graveyard: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.

card.name: Outland Jarl
card.text: Vigilance, trample When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white Viking creature token, then distribute X +1/+1 counters among any number of creatures you control.

card.name: Impassable Fortress
card.text: Prevent the first X damage you would be dealt each turn, where X is the number of fortified lands you control. Fortify {1}{G} ({1}{G}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Raevir General
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever you cast a white spell, up to one target creature gains vigilance until end of turn. Whenever you cast a blue spell, up to one target creature gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Draugr General
card.text: Whenever you cast a blue spell, draw a card. Whenever you cast a black spell, each opponent discards a card.

card.name: General Chaos
card.text: Whenever you cast a black spell, up to one target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. Whenever you cast a red spell, this enchantment deals 2 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Realm Rover
card.text: Flying; pillage (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.) Whenever you discard a card for the first time each turn, destroy target artifact, creature, or land.

card.name: Talar General
card.text: Whenever you cast a red spell, exile the top two cards of your library. You may play them until your next end step. Whenever you cast a green spell, you may play an additional land this turn.

card.name: Runestone Ritual
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+1 and have "{T}: Add one mana of any color."

card.name: Alfir General
card.text: Whenever you cast a white spell, create a 1/1 white Viking creature token. Whenever you cast a black spell, you may sacrifice a permanent. If you do, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Dvergr General
card.text: Whenever you cast a blue spell, creatures you control get +0/+1 until end of turn. Whenever you cast a red spell, creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: The Blood Tide
card.text: Haste When this Vehicle enters, if you cast it, create three tokens that are copies of it. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Deepcaller's Horn
card.text: {T}, Exile a card from your graveyard: Create a 1/1 white Viking creature token.

card.name: Varaklysm
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Each opponent sacrifices a land. II — Each opponent discards a card. III — Choose a creature type. Destroy all creatures of the chosen type.

card.name: Humble Seamstress
card.text: {T}, Discard a card: Draw a card. {T}: Reveal your hand. If the total mana value of cards revealed this way is exactly 9, transform this creature. --- (Back): Seskrin, Lifeweaver

card.name: Seskrin, Lifeweaver
card.text: Ward—Pay X life. X is the number of cards in your your graveyard. {T}: You may cast a spell from your hand without paying its mana cost. --- (Front): Humble Seamstress

card.name: Altar Between Worlds
card.text: {6}{W}, {T}: Exile target creature. {6}{U}, {T}: Scry 3, then draw three cards. {6}{B}, {T}: Put target creature card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. {6}{R}, {T}: Creatures you control get +3/+0 and gain trample until end of turn. {6}{G}, {T}: Distribute five +1/+1 counter among any number of target creatures.

card.name: Runspau, the Seer
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) Whenever Runspau or another Human enters under your control, look at the top three cards of your library, reveal a land card from among them, put it into your hand, then put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.name: Vestri, Queen of Dokkar
card.text: Vestri, Queen of Dokkar's power and toughness are each equal to the number of creatures you control. Whenever Vestri attacks, another target Elf creature you control gets +X/+X until end of turn, where X is Vestri's power.

card.name: Kurth, The Allseer
card.text: Whenever Kurth, The Allseer becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, that opponent loses the game at the beginning of the next end step. When Kurth enters the battlefield, if you didn't cast it from your hand, you lose the game. At the beginning of your end step, search your library for a permanent card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Dunvar, the Nurturer
card.text: Whenever Dunvar attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on it, then you may return a creature card with mana value less than or equal to Dunvar's power from a graveyard to the battlefield under your control. {X}{UB}{UB}: Target player mills X cards.

card.name: Askild, Ineffable Boar
card.text: Indestructible {2}{BG}{BG}, Exile a creature card from your graveyard: Put a number of +1/+1 counters on Askild equal to that card's power.

card.name: Varskur, Scourge of Sjofir
card.text: Other creatures you control have base power and toughness 9/9. Whenever Varskur attacks, you may pay {7}{BR}{BR}. If you do, return up to nine target creature cards with mana value 9 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped and attacking.

card.name: Eilert, Sun Chaser
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature enters or transforms into Eilert, Sun Chaser, creatures you don't control get -1/-1 until end of turn. At the beginning of your end step, you may pay {RG}{RG}. If you do, transform Eilert. --- (Back): Odine, Moon Chaser

card.name: Odine, Moon Chaser
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature transforms into Odine, Moon Chaser, it deals damage equal to its power to target creature or planeswalker you don't control. At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may pay {B}{B}. If you do, transform Odine. --- (Front): Eilert, Sun Chaser

card.name: Herida, the Temptress
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, you may pay X life. If you do, gain control of target nontoken creature with mana value X for as long as you control Herida. {GU}{GU}: Herida gains hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Davriel, Interloper
card.text: When Davriel, Interloper has nine or more loyalty counters on him, transform him. [+3]: Look at the top card of each player's library, then target player mills three cards. [+1]: Target player discards a card. --- (Back): Davriel, God of Thieves

card.name: Davriel, God of Thieves
card.text: Ward—Pay X life, where X is the number of loyalty counters on Davriel, God of Thieves. {T}, Remove X loyalty counters from Davriel: Put a creature card with mana value X from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. --- (Front): Davriel, Interloper

card.name: Thrya, Steed of the Gods
card.text: Reach, haste At the beginning of each combat, you may pay {GW}{GW}. If you do, creatures you control gain first strike until end of turn if a creature you control has first strike. The same is true for flying, deathtouch, double strike, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, pillage, trample, and vigilance.

card.name: Dagny, Sun's Chariot
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature enters or transforms into Dagny, Sun's Chariot, creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain trample and haste until end of turn. At the beginning of your end step, you may pay {WB}{WB}. If you do, transform Dagny. --- (Back): Signa, Moon's Chariot

card.name: Signa, Moon's Chariot
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature transforms into Signa, Moon's Chariot, create a 1/1 white and black Horse creature token with lifelink. At the beginning of your combat on your turn, you may pay {R}{R}. If you do, transform Signa. --- (Front): Dagny, Sun's Chariot

card.name: Aina, Svetnar Uniter
card.text: Kicker {WU}{WU} (You may pay an additional {WU}{WU} as you cast this spell.) When Aina enters, if she was kicked, put a kinship counter on her. She gains "You may activate Aina's abilities twice each turn rather than only once." [+1]: Untap target land. [-2]: Until end of turn, target land you control gains "{T}: Create a 3/2 green Spirit creature token." [-8]: You get an emblem with "At the beginning of each combat, untap all lands you control."

card.name: Siglar, Master Shipwright
card.text: When Siglar enters, you may create Kompmarr, a legendary 3/3 colorless Vehicle artifact token. It has crew 2 and "Whenever you activate a loyalty ability of a Siglar planeswalker, this Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn." [+1]: Target artifact you control gains indestructible and haste until end of turn. [-2]: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature and Vehicle you control.

card.name: Bedral the Fractured
card.text: When Bedral the Fractured enters, exile all Gods. Permanents can't transform. When Bedral dies, you may exile it. If you do, exile target nonland permanent.

card.name: Sjofir, The World Sea
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Voyage — {3}, {T}: Add X mana of any one color, where X is equal to the number of differently named lands you control.

card.name: Blind Shot
card.text: Target opponent discards two cards. {1}{R}, Exile Blind Shot from your graveyard: It deals damage to target player equal to the number of cards that have been discarded by all players this turn.

card.name: Ring of Infinity
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. At the beginning of your upkeep, if Ring of Infinity isn't a token, create a token that's a copy of it.

card.name: Assault on Vedgard
card.text: Take an extra turn after this one. During that turn, whenever a creature you control attacks, it gains pillage until end of turn. (Whenever a creature with pillage deals combat damage to a player, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card. Multiple instance of pillage stack.) Exile Assault on Vedgard.

card.name: Tireless Draugr
card.text: Pillage (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.) This creature enters tapped. {1}{B}: Return this creature from your graveyard to your hand. Activate only during your turn and only if you drew two or more cards this turn.

card.name: Hulvara, Hearth of the Graveless
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}. Whenever this or another land enters under your control, if you control seven or more lands with different names, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token.

card.name: Jotun General
card.text: Whenever you cast a green spell, reveal the top card of your library. If it's a creature card, put it onto the battlefield. Whenever you cast a blue spell, reveal the top card of your library. If it's an artifact card, put it onto the battlefield.

card.name: Waddell, Realm Runner
card.text: Trample, haste Whenever Waddell deals combat damage to a player, search your library for a land card with a basic land type, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {8}{UR}{UR}: Until end of turn, you may cast spells from your hand without paying their mana costs.

card.name: Fade into Obscurity
card.text: Destroy target creature with power 3 or less. Target player mills three cards.

card.name: Secret Streams
card.text: When Secret Streams enters, each player mills two cards. You may play land cards from graveyards.
